query:
-- Verificar colunas da tabela stock_files
SHOW COLUMNS FROM stock_files;
stdout:
Field	Type	Null	Key	Default	Extra
id	int	NO	PRI	NULL	auto_increment
brandId	int	NO		NULL	
fileUrl	varchar(500)	NO		NULL	
fileName	varchar(255)	NO		NULL	
fileType	varchar(50)	YES		NULL	
fileSize	int	YES		NULL	
description	text	YES		NULL	
uploadedBy	int	NO		NULL	
visibility	enum('all_promoters','specific_stores','specific_users')	NO		all_promoters	
createdAt	timestamp	NO		CURRENT_TIMESTAMP	
updatedAt	timestamp	NO		CURRENT_TIMESTAMP	DEFAULT_GENERATED on update CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
